course.title: Machine Learning for Engineers: The AI-Assisted Approach

outcomes.description: Apply LLM tools (ChatGPT, Gemini) to generate, analyze, and modify machine learning code for solving real-world problems
Evaluate and optimize machine learning models using appropriate metrics and AI-assisted debugging techniques
Design and implement end-to-end ML solutions for classification, regression, computer vision, and NLP problems using AI assistance
Demonstrate effective prompt engineering skills to communicate ML requirements and iterate on AI-generated solutions
Deploy machine learning applications using cloud-based resources and explain their functionality to technical and non-technical audiences

modules.title: Prerequisites - Setting Up Your AI-Assisted Learning Environment

outcomes.description: Configure and access multiple LLM platforms (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) through web, IDE, and API interfaces
Compare CPU and GPU performance for ML tasks and set up cloud-based GPU environments
Select appropriate LLM tools and compute resources based on project requirements and constraints

sessions.title: Introduction to LLMs and Account Setup

outcomes.description: Create accounts on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude platforms
Identify key differences between GPT-4, Gemini, Claude, and open-source LLMs
Test the same ML-related prompt across different LLMs and compare response quality
Use web-based interfaces to interact with LLMs for code generation
Install and configure IDE plugins (Copilot, Cursor) for in-editor AI assistance
Execute basic API calls to LLM services and interpret responses
Explain the difference between CPU and GPU processing for ML workloads
Run a simple ML task on both CPU and GPU, comparing execution time
Configure a Google Colab notebook with GPU acceleration
Compare free vs paid cloud GPU services for cost-effectiveness
Apply prompt engineering techniques to elicit high-quality ML code and explanations from LLMs
Analyze ML problem statements and decompose them into AI-actionable prompts
Build a simple ML prediction model using AI-generated code and execute it successfully
Define machine learning and distinguish it from traditional programming
Identify real-world problems suitable for ML solutions
Use LLMs to explain ML concepts in multiple ways for different audiences
Construct effective prompts that specify ML requirements clearly
Iterate on AI-generated code by providing targeted follow-up prompts
Request code explanations at different levels of technical depth

sessions.title: Setting Up ML Environment and First Model

outcomes.description: Use AI assistance to install Python, Jupyter, and essential ML libraries
Generate and execute a simple prediction model using AI-provided code
Explain each line of AI-generated ML code with AI assistance
Build classification models using AI-generated code for binary and multi-class problems
Compare different classification algorithms and select appropriate ones for specific use cases
Debug and fix errors in AI-generated classification code using AI assistance
Explain what classification problems are and provide real-world examples
Distinguish between binary and multi-class classification problems
Use LLMs to generate a simple binary classification example with sample data
Describe how Decision Trees, Random Forest, SVM, and Logistic Regression work conceptually
Generate code for multiple classification algorithms using AI and run them on the same dataset
Compare algorithm performance and recommend the best choice for a given problem
Explain the importance of splitting data into training and testing sets
Use AI to generate code that properly splits data and trains a classifier
Identify and fix data leakage issues in AI-generated code
Use AI to identify and create relevant features for classification problems
Build a complete email spam detector using AI-assisted code generation
Debug classification errors by analyzing confusion patterns with AI help
Implement regression models using AI assistance to predict continuous values
Analyze regression model performance and identify factors affecting prediction accuracy
Apply feature scaling and handle outliers in regression problems using AI-generated techniques
Define regression and distinguish it from classification
Identify real-world problems that require regression solutions
Generate and run a simple linear regression model using AI assistance
Explain the difference between linear and non-linear regression
Use AI to implement multiple regression algorithms (Linear, Polynomial, Random Forest Regressor)
Compare regression algorithms on the same dataset and select the best performer
Explain why feature scaling is important for regression models
Apply standardization and normalization techniques using AI-generated code
Detect outliers in datasets and implement handling strategies with AI assistance
Build a house price prediction model using AI-assisted development
Analyze prediction errors and identify patterns using visualization
Improve regression model performance by iterating on features and algorithms with AI help
Calculate and interpret evaluation metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, RMSE) using AI tools
Diagnose overfitting and underfitting in models and apply correction strategies
Optimize model hyperparameters using AI-assisted tuning techniques
Explain accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score in the context of classification
Use AI to calculate and visualize classification metrics from model predictions
Interpret confusion matrices and determine which metric matters most for a given problem
Explain the concepts of overfitting and underfitting with examples
Implement k-fold cross-validation using AI-generated code
Diagnose overfitting by comparing training and validation performance
Apply regularization techniques with AI assistance to reduce overfitting
Define hyperparameters and distinguish them from model parameters
Use AI to implement grid search and random search for hyperparameter optimization
Evaluate the impact of different hyperparameters on model performance
Implement clustering algorithms using AI assistance to discover patterns in unlabeled data
Apply dimensionality reduction techniques to visualize high-dimensional data
Build anomaly detection systems using AI-generated code for fraud or fault detection
Explain unsupervised learning and how it differs from supervised learning
Implement K-Means clustering using AI-generated code on a sample dataset
Determine the optimal number of clusters using elbow method and silhouette scores
Compare K-Means, DBSCAN, and Hierarchical clustering approaches
Use AI to implement DBSCAN for density-based clustering
Build a customer segmentation system using clustering with AI assistance
Explain why dimensionality reduction is useful for data visualization and processing
Apply PCA to reduce high-dimensional data using AI-generated code
Use t-SNE for visualization and interpret the resulting clusters
Define anomaly detection and identify use cases in fraud and fault detection
Implement isolation forest and one-class SVM for anomaly detection using AI
Build a fraud detection system and evaluate its effectiveness

modules.title: Neural Networks and Deep Learning Basics

outcomes.description: Build simple neural networks using AI-generated TensorFlow/Keras/PyTorch code
Analyze how neural network architecture choices affect model performance
Apply transfer learning using pre-trained models with AI assistance
Explain what neural networks are and how they differ from traditional ML
Describe the components of a neural network (neurons, layers, weights, biases)
Use AI to generate and train a simple neural network for classification
Explain common activation functions (ReLU, Sigmoid, Tanh) and their purposes
Experiment with different network architectures (layers, neurons) using AI assistance
Analyze the impact of architecture changes on training time and accuracy
Use AI to generate code that builds a neural network using Keras Sequential API
Train a neural network on MNIST digit dataset and visualize learning progress
Debug common neural network errors (vanishing gradients, poor convergence) with AI help
Explain transfer learning and when it's beneficial to use pre-trained models
Load and fine-tune a pre-trained model using AI-generated code
Compare training from scratch vs transfer learning in terms of time and accuracy
Build image classification systems using CNNs with AI-generated code
Implement object detection and image processing tasks using pre-trained models
Evaluate computer vision models and optimize them for accuracy and speed
Explain what computer vision is and list common applications
Use AI to load, display, and preprocess images for ML models
Describe how Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) process images
Use AI to build a CNN architecture for image classification
Train a custom image classifier on your own dataset with AI assistance
Evaluate model performance on test images and identify misclassification patterns
Distinguish between image classification and object detection
Implement object detection using pre-trained models (YOLO, SSD) with AI help
Build a face detection application using AI-generated code
Design a custom computer vision solution for a real-world problem
Optimize CV model for speed and accuracy based on deployment constraints
Implement image augmentation techniques to improve model robustness
Build text classification and sentiment analysis systems using AI-generated NLP code
Apply text preprocessing and tokenization techniques for NLP tasks
Implement transformer-based models for NLP applications with AI assistance
Explain what Natural Language Processing is and list common applications
Use AI to preprocess text data (cleaning, tokenization, lowercasing)
Build a simple sentiment classifier using bag-of-words with AI assistance
Explain TF-IDF and word embeddings for text representation
Build a sentiment analysis system for product reviews using AI-generated code
Evaluate text classifier performance and interpret confusion patterns
Explain word embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe) and their advantages over TF-IDF
Use pre-trained word embeddings in text classification with AI help
Describe transformer architecture and its impact on modern NLP
Use AI to implement a transformer-based model from Hugging Face
Build a text summarization tool using pre-trained transformers
Create a simple chatbot using AI-generated NLP code
Design and implement end-to-end ML pipelines from data collection to deployment
Deploy ML models as web APIs using AI-assisted development
Create monitoring dashboards and implement basic MLOps practices
Describe the stages of an end-to-end ML pipeline
Use AI to collect, clean, and prepare data for ML modeling
Build a complete ML workflow from raw data to predictions with AI assistance
Explain different deployment options (cloud, edge, API)
Use AI to create a Flask/FastAPI endpoint that serves ML predictions
Deploy an ML model to a cloud platform (Heroku, AWS, Google Cloud) with AI help
Explain the importance of model monitoring and maintenance
Use AI to create a monitoring dashboard showing model performance metrics
Implement basic logging and error handling for deployed models
Build and deploy 3 mini ML applications in rapid succession
Document ML projects using AI-generated README and documentation
Present ML solutions to technical and non-technical audiences
Design and implement a complete ML solution addressing a real-world problem
Evaluate project outcomes against success criteria and iterate on improvements
Present and document the ML project professionally for portfolio use
Select a capstone project aligned with career goals and interests
Define project scope, success criteria, and deliverables
Design the ML solution architecture with AI assistance
Implement data collection and preprocessing pipeline using AI tools
Build, train, and optimize ML models for the project with AI assistance
Troubleshoot and debug project issues using AI-assisted problem-solving
Test the ML application thoroughly and validate against success criteria
Deploy the final ML application using appropriate platform
Create comprehensive project documentation and README with AI help
Create a professional presentation explaining the project and its impact
Record a demonstration video showcasing the ML application
Reflect on learning journey and identify areas for continued growth
